user.title: Home Generative Agent
user.description: Default features are being created. Next, run **Setup** to enable/configure features and the database, then add a **Model Provider**.

error.cannot_connect: Can't reach the service. Check keys/URLs and try again.

set_options.title: Database setup
set_options.description: Enter the necessary parameters for the databse

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the database. Check the database settings and try again.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Select a provider type and name.

settings.title: Provider settings
settings.description: Configure the provider endpoint or credentials.

data_description.api_key: Required for OpenAI. For OpenAI Compatible providers, leave blank or enter 'none' if the endpoint requires no authentication.

provider.title: Speech-to-Text Provider
provider.description: Select a provider type and name.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.description: Choose how to authenticate the STT provider.

model.title: Model & advanced options
model.description: Select a model and optional advanced settings.

error.invalid_camera_entry_links: Must be a JSON object mapping camera entity IDs to lists of entry entity IDs, e.g. {{"camera.driveway": ["lock.front_door"]}}.
error.quiet_hours_incomplete: Set both quiet hours start and end (or set both to Disabled).
error.invalid_quiet_hours: Quiet hours must be local hours between 0 and 23.

setup_mode.title: Sentinel Setup
setup_mode.description: Choose how to configure Sentinel monitoring.{overwrite_warning}

basic_settings.title: Sentinel
basic_settings.description: Configure the essential Sentinel settings. All other options use recommended defaults.

settings.title: Sentinel
settings.description: Configure proactive Sentinel monitoring and discovery.

data.sentinel_baseline_weekly_patterns: Enable day-of-week baselines (reduces weekend false positives)
data.sentinel_baseline_dow_min_samples: DOW baseline minimum samples (weeks of data per slot)
data.sentinel_baseline_min_samples: Baseline minimum samples before deviation alerts fire
data.sentinel_baseline_sustained_minutes: Cyclical load gate: minutes above threshold before alerting (0 = disabled)
data.explain_enabled: Enable LLM explanations for sentinel findings
data.sentinel_require_pin_for_level_increase: Require PIN for autonomy level increases

abort.no_provider_for_basic_setup: No model provider is configured. Add a **Model Provider** first, then retry setup.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the database. Check settings and try again.

setup_mode.title: Setup
setup_mode.description: Choose a setup type. Basic setup enables all features with recommended defaults. Advanced setup gives you full control over each feature.{overwrite_warning}

setup_status.title: Setup complete
setup_status.description:
Setup is done.

**Features enabled:** {features_enabled}{skipped_section}

**Database:** {database_status}

**Next steps:**
- Run **Configure Sentinel** to enable anomaly monitoring.
- Add an **STT Provider** for voice input.
- Go to **Settings → Voice Assistants** to add Home Generative Agent as your voice assistant.

feature_enable.title: Feature setup
feature_enable.description: **Conversation** is always enabled. Enable or disable optional features below.

data_description.embedding: Embedding model for semantic memory and tool search. When off, the provider is chosen automatically (the Conversation provider if it supports embeddings).

feature_model.title: {feature_name}
feature_model.description: Configure model settings for this feature. {provider_notice}

data_description.fallback_provider_ids: Ordered list of fallback providers. The first available provider is used if the primary fails.

database.title: Database setup
database.description: Enter the necessary parameters for the database.

instructions.title: Add a model provider
instructions.description: No model provider is configured yet. Add one from **Model Provider**.

key.name: Key
key.description: Connection parameter name (for example: sslmode, connect_timeout)

data.critical_action_pin: Critical action PIN (required to unlock/arm/open sensitive devices)

data_description.prompt: Instruct how the LLM should respond. This can be a template.
data_description.schema_first_yaml: When enabled, YAML requests are answered with strict JSON that is converted to YAML.
data_description.stt_hallucination_patterns: One substring per line. If an STT transcript contains any entry, it is ignored before the LLM runs. Matching is case-insensitive.
data_description.stt_hallucination_exact_patterns: One phrase per line. If the entire STT transcript equals any entry, it is ignored before the LLM runs. Matching is case-insensitive.
data_description.tool_retrieval_limit: The maximum number of tools to retrieve based on semantic similarity to the user's query.
data_description.tool_relevance_threshold: The minimum semantic similarity score (0.0 to 1.0) required for a tool to be retrieved.
data_description.video_analyzer_uniqueness_enabled: Skip visually near-identical frames before VLM analysis. Warning: enabling this removes inter-frame motion context that the summary model uses to narrate movement. Only enable if a static scene generates excessive duplicates and you accept that motion continuity may be lost.
data_description.video_analyzer_motion_camera_map: One override per line: binary_sensor.X_motion: camera.Y — use this when automatic resolution picks the wrong camera. Leave blank to rely on device-based and name-based resolution.
